meta.tagline: Choose the best driver. Choose the best price.

home.headline: ZRIK
home.copy:
Choose the best driver.
Choose the best price.
home.stepsLead: ZRIK is an exclusive marketplace: define the trip, receive offers, choose with full control.
home.step1Body: Origin, destination, and what matters along the way.
home.step2Body: Verified drivers reply with price and vehicle.
home.step3Body: Compare, accept, and travel with transparency.

auth.loginHint: Demo: cliente@movio.app · motorista@movio.app · admin@movio.app — password movio123
auth.registerLead: Request trips or send offers — one account, one role to start.
auth.accountType: How would you like to begin?
auth.name: Full name

how.title: How ZRIK works
how.lead: A private-chauffeur marketplace reduced to the essentials: request, propose, choose.

forDrivers.title: Drive with intention
forDrivers.lead: See open requests, set your price, and grow with verified trust.

branding.title: Branding Preview
branding.lead: Typographic logo variants. For homepage photography and color, use Homepage Lab.
branding.optionB: Option B — Z in accent blue
branding.optionBDesc: Z in accent · RIK in #111111. Preferred structure.
branding.optionC: Option C — Z and K in accent
branding.optionCDesc: Z and K in accent · RI in #111111.
branding.note: No photo/color is locked here — decide in Homepage Lab.
branding.petrolLead: Quick preview. Final decision happens in Homepage Lab.
branding.logoLead: No 3D icon. A / B / C comparison.

homepageLab.title: Homepage Lab
homepageLab.lead: Compare photography, color, and contrast. Nothing is applied to the production homepage until you pick a winner.
homepageLab.note: Inspiration: Apple · Porsche · Mercedes · Polestar · Linear — European identity, not an Uber lookalike.
homepageLab.notLocked: Preview only — production stays unchanged until you decide.
